# Slide-Ready Tables Index

This folder contains tables that can be copied into a deck or paper.

Recommended use:

- Use `01_Five_Signal_Layers_Table.md` in the thesis section.
- Use `02_Tactic_By_Signal_Layer_Table.md` in the taxonomy section.
- Use `03_Case_Study_Evidence_Table.md` in the methods section.
- Use `04_Harms_By_Stakeholder_Table.md` in the ethics section.
- Use `05_Detection_Red_Flags_Table.md` in the forensics section.
- Use `06_Platform_Boundary_Table.md` in the law/policy section.
